epigraph.quote: Denzel brings in mice, or rather just the intestines of mice, having eaten the rest of them. 12 mice in 6 days.

per_stop.quote: We stopped in Bourneville to buy buttons.
We parked by the river park, flat land, below Ross on Wye & walked up the hill for a good lunch at Man of Ross.
a mock barrack room for 8 men with bunks – nice curators.
We have forgotten marmalade & tea towels.
John cooked delicious beef Wellington for supper
